inputs.text: nsfw, 1milf solo, (sitting at breakfast table holding coffee cup:1.3), (looking at son across the table with calm intensity:1.2), medium shot, eye-level, morning kitchen atmosphere, [Kamisaka Misui] in foreground BREAK Kamisaka Misui: 42yo female, black hair in loose low bun with stray strands curling at temples from kitchen steam, fair skin, hourglass figure with full breasts and wide hips, brown eyes fixed steadily on the one across from her, (sitting upright at wooden dining table, legs crossed under table), (wearing pale purple silk camisole nightgown with thin straps, no cardigan, fabric draping over curves and clinging at hips), (barefoot with one slipper half-off under the table, toes relaxed), (bare face with faint crease marks on cheek from pillow, lips still glossy from morning coffee, expression composed but eyes tracking every small movement), BREAK morning, sunlit Japanese kitchen, wooden dining table with egg dish and plate of chilled mochi in center, two place settings with one chair empty, window with half-open blinds showing glimpse of neighbor s house, coffee steam rising in sunbeam, BREAK soft morning light through blinds creating horizontal stripes of light and shadow, warm domestic atmosphere with underlying tension
